page_title: Job Application for Staff Embedded Application Software Engineer at Axon

detector_only: the role requires you to be in boston, seattle and work in our office 4 days a week. if not in one of those cities, can you confirm your willingness to relocate to one of them, and work in office tuesday through friday? linkedin profile
are you legally authorized to work in the united states for any us employer now and in the future? linkedin profile
will you now or in the future require sponsorship for employment in the united states? linkedin profile
can you provide verification of both your identity and authorization to work in the united states, to the extent required by law? linkedin profile
are you at least 18 years of age? linkedin profile

if your scope of work requires exposure to u.s. export administration controlled technology and you are a non-us person as defined below, will you be able to coordinate with axon trade compliance on obtaining u.s. department of commerce licensing as needed? linkedin profile
do you have any contractual obligations, agreements, relationships, or commitments to another person or entity that would impact, impede or interfere with your ability to join axon? linkedin profile
have you ever been employed by axon? linkedin profile

ai.notes: The HTML excerpt is truncated, so additional fields (like resume upload, LinkedIn, or screening questions) that typically appear in Greenhouse forms are missing from this output.
